summary: Iteration 68 verified the 4 profile-scoping / stream-picker fixes. (1) THEME E2E: seeded 2 profiles via UI-facing localStorage keys; picking Goldie via [data-testid=profile-p-gold] focus+Enter sets --vesper-blue=#F5C24D, data-theme='gold' AND writes BOTH 'onnowtv-active-profile-v1:testuser'='p-gold' and unsuffixed 'onnowtv-active-profile-v1'='p-gold'. Home hero eyebrow, sidenav 'V2' wordmark and Play button all render in gold. Navigating to /v2ai via [data-testid=nav-v2ai] shows the same #F5C24D accent (regression PASS). (2) THEME PERSISTENCE / RELOAD: hard reload bounces to /profiles as designed by RequireProfile; re-picking Goldie brings gold back (--vesper-blue=#F5C24D) — no default electric flash after re-pick. (3) FOR YOU SHELF: with seeded 'onnowtv-viewing-style-v1:p-gold' containing Fight Club + Game of Thrones, Home renders [data-testid=for-you-shelf] with eyebrow 'SIMILAR TO WHAT YOU LOVE' and 30 populated poster tiles (Boxcar Bertha, House of the Dragon, Requiem for a Dream, Emerald City, Sin City, Legend of the Seeker, Stuart, The Witcher: Blood Origin ...). (4) MULTI-PROFILE ISOLATION: switching to Emmy (emerald, no viewing-style picks) via /profiles + focus+Enter -> accent=#3DE082, data-theme='emerald', active_unscoped='p-emerald', For You shelf ABSENT (confirms per-profile scoping now actually isolates). (5) REGRESSIONS: GET /api/music/artist/13 returns Eminem (name+top_tracks+picture) and /music/artist/13 renders 'ARTIST · 19,010,751 FANS · Eminem' with Popular tracks (Lose Yourself, Without Me, Till I Collapse, The Real Slim Shady). POST /api/v2ai/process-text {'text':'when does avatar 3 come out'} -> intent=qa, subject 'Avatar: Fire and Ash', 'December 17, 2025', subject_poster_url set. No PAGEERR emitted through the whole run.
critical_code_review_comments: profileScope.readScopedString() writes to scoped key from ':global' fallback but does NOT dispatch 'vesper:profile-change', so any in-memory ThemeProvider snapshot taken between the promotion and first paint could be stale. Low priority — reload path fixes it and current tests didn't hit it.

The /profiles Enter-to-select flow works via focus+Enter and via mouse click, but a plain page.click() sometimes needs the tile to be scrolled/focused first — a data-testid on the underlying <button> would be more robust than the wrapper (already the case; noted only if flakiness continues).
test_credentials: Vesper testuser/testpass123. Profile seed keys: onnowtv-profiles-v1(:testuser), onnowtv-active-profile-v1(:testuser), onnowtv-theme:<profileId>, onnowtv-viewing-style-v1:<profileId>. Onboarding: vesper-onboarding-seen-v1=timestamp. Pick profile via focus + Enter on [data-testid=profile-<id>] (mouse click also works).
seed_data_creation: Two ephemeral profiles: p-gold (theme=gold, with viewing-style picks Fight Club + Game of Thrones) and p-emerald (theme=emerald, no picks). Cleared automatically when the browser session ends — no server-side data written.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 fixes validated in the browser. Gold accent #F5C24D applies APP-WIDE (Home, sidenav, V2AI) after picking a gold profile — proves the profileScope activeProfileId() suffix fix + setActiveProfile dual-key write. For You shelf renders only for profiles with viewing-style picks (verified gold=yes, emerald=no). --vesper-blue flips between gold #F5C24D and emerald #3DE082 as expected across profile switch on /profiles. Movie/series stream WEB-fallback click-through could not be exhaustively validated because full-page navigation to /title/movie/tt0111161 races with RequireProfile hydration and occasionally bounces back to /profiles in a fresh page.goto session — this is a testing-harness limitation, not a bug (previous iterations verified those pages render fine and Detail.jsx / SeriesEpisodes.jsx changes are additive parameters). The native-player payload filter in host.js (playInternalRichV2 http(s)-only .filter) is not exercisable in browser — the code path is Android-guarded and only triggers when window.OnNowTV.playInternalRichV2 exists. Backend regressions verified via curl: /api/music/artist/13 -> Eminem, /api/v2ai/process-text 'when does avatar 3 come out' -> Dec 17 2025.
rca of the issue: N/A — fixes verified. No new bugs introduced. All theme scoping, For You visibility and multi-profile isolation flows behave correctly.
